label: Scraper Control
info: Manual triggers for all 15 county scrapers via GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch

name: 🕷 Scraper Control — Manual Triggers via GitHub Actions
info:
Each button triggers a workflow_dispatch event via the GitHub API.
All scrapers also run on cron schedules (4x daily).
Requires GITHUB_PAT env var with repo+workflow scope.
